docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CASIMIR A. WILSON'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CASIMIR A. WILSON'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES.
APPEARANCE: Joseph M. Breall, Esq. of Breall & Breall, LLP 345-0545 for pltf & opposing party; Martin H. Q. Nguyen, Esq. of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney 788-1900 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Moving party did not comply with the tentative ruling rule (re giving proper notice to opposing party of their intent to appear at the hearing). Therefore, the Court did not allow any oral argument and adopted its tentative ruling - OVERRULED. 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. Order signed in open court. (302/PHA/PB) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
